description_long: This house is a single-story, rectangular residential building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted concrete, and feature evenly spaced rectangular windows. The property includes a large green lawn with mature trees, a pergola, and a landscaped rock garden, as well as paved walkways and a driveway. The main entrance is defined by a small set of steps and a covered porch area, while the rear section of the house opens onto a spacious patio with outdoor seating. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall layout is open and functional, with clear separation between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light exterior, symmetrical windows, and landscaped yard featuring trees, a pergola, and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, green lawn, pergola, and rock garden.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the rear patio, outdoor seating, and the open layout connecting indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the flat roof, rear windows, and the expanse of the green lawn with mature trees.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the landscaped yard, pergola, and the arrangement of windows along the house's length.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, covered porch, and simple modern door
